title: What's new
subtitle: The latest improvements to the app.

whats-new-panel.title: Follow what's new
whats-new-panel.body: This panel lists the latest improvements. A dot on the button lets you know when something new has landed.

ai-formatting.title: Easier-to-read AI replies
ai-formatting.body: The assistant now formats its answers with lists, bold text and headings instead of plain blocks of text.

loading-skeletons.title: Smoother loading
loading-skeletons.body: Animated placeholders now appear while your dashboard and lists load.

friendly-errors.title: Clearer error screens
friendly-errors.body: If something goes wrong or a page doesn't exist, a friendly screen helps you retry or get back home.
